mapper.select: SELECT bp.id, bp.category, bp.title, bp.content, u.display_name AS author, bp.author_id, bp.views, bp.likes, bp.comment_count, bp.pinned, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at FROM board_posts bp JOIN users u ON u.user_id = bp.author_id WHERE bp.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_posts ( category, title, content, author_id, pinned, views, likes, comment_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{pinned}, 0, 0, 0, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, pinned = #{pinned}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board_posts SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board_posts SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board_posts SET likes = GREATEST(0, likes - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO board_post_likes (user_id, post_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board_posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(0, comment_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT bc.id, bc.post_id, bc.author_id, u.display_name AS author, bc.content, bc.likes, bc.created_at, bc.updated_at FROM board_comments bc JOIN users u ON u.user_id = bc.author_id WHERE bc.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY bc.created_at ASC

SELECT bc.id, bc.post_id, bc.author_id, u.display_name AS author, bc.content, bc.likes, bc.created_at, bc.updated_at FROM board_comments bc JOIN users u ON u.user_id = bc.author_id WHERE bc.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comments ( post_id, author_id, content, likes, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{authorId}, #{content}, 0, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comments SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board_comments SET likes = GREATEST(0, likes - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO board_comment_likes (user_id, comment_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{commentId})
